_comment: LIVE TRADING CONFIG. Loading this file does NOT by itself enable live trading — the KalshiLiveExecutor also requires: (1) --execute CLI flag, (2) KALSHI_API_KEY_ID env var set, (3) mode=='live' here, (4) dry_run=false. All four must align.
_asset_note: Per feasibility report §6.3: narrow to BTC/XRP/DOGE/HYPE. Drop BNB (lag unexploitable); de-prioritize ETH/SOL until they turn live-positive.

risk._comment: Tightened vs paper — P2-M5 starts with 1 concurrent position and $100/day loss stop per plan §7.

secrets._comment: In prod deploy, these resolve from AWS Secrets Manager via the IAM role.
